pr.title: Add Chinese final-exam review README
pr.body:
The repo only contained lecture PDFs, with no consolidated review doc tied to the `final review.pdf` exam guidance. This adds a Chinese README that turns the uploaded slides into a structured final-exam study guide.

- **Exam framing**
  - Captures the final’s format, scoring, and difficulty notes from `final review.pdf`
  - Surfaces what matters for each section: single choice, multiple choice, calculations, and short answers

- **Topic organization**
  - Groups the uploaded slides into review modules:
    - image filters
    - edges & contours
    - features & matching
    - detection & segmentation
    - ML/CNN optimization
    - RNN/Transformer
    - generation & 3D reconstruction

- **Study guidance**
  - Adds high-frequency concepts, common traps, and what to be able to explain vs. compute
  - Includes a last-day checklist for focused review

- **Source traceability**
  - Lists the PDFs used to build the guide so the review path stays explicit and easy to maintain
pr.author: Copilot
